title: Alabasta’s Crisis Deepens
description: On pages 15–17, this part focuses on alabasta’s crisis deepens, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Alabasta’s Crisis Deepens. Ace steps between Luffy and the Marines, showing his strength while Vivi pushes the mission toward stopping Crocodile. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: The 2nd Division Commander of the Whitebeard Pirates is here!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I ain't kidding! I saw "Flame Fist Ace" with my own two eyes!

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: If we can kill him, then our promotion to numbered agents is all but guaranteed!

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Get back to the ship! We'll finish him off on the seas!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What...? There's no way such a polite and rational guy,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: N-now, wow...

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Could actually be Luffy's older brother!

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: I always imagined if Luffy had an older brother, he'd be even more "Luffy" than Luffy, if you know what I mean.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Brother- hood's a wonderful thing, isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He's... Such a good older brother!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well, whaddya know... The world's a strange and mysterious place.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: See ya, ace!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: ppb...

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Let's do this! There's 50 of us billions and 5 ships!

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: Try to escape if you can! We know your weakness is the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Aghh! He jumped! shoot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It'll be our victory if he falls into the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Aghh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Flame Fist!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Aghh haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hurry and come up to the top,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Luffy!

summary: This part highlights alabasta’s crisis deepens and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
